media.ext_alt_text: The image described shows a deep connection between music and visual art.  A grand piano with musical notes is a symbol of creativity and human emotions.  The open and wave-like door in the background is a symbol of music's ability to transport us to new worlds and diverse sensations.  This rotation and movement of trees depicts the spirit of life and dynamism.  The low keys drawn outwards represent the dynamic and creative effect of art and show that music can take a person to new beauties and depths.  This image is not only a work of art, but an invitation to experience the feelings and thoughts that music can create in us.🎼

media.ext_alt_text:
In today's complex and busy world, the feeling of relaxation has become a basic need.  Communicating with nature and its beauty can help us get rid of everyday pressures and stresses.  An image of a woman holding a bouquet of blue flowers is a sign of this deep connection.  Flowers are not only a symbol of beauty and tenderness, but also a reminder of life and freshness.  Her off-the-shoulder and flowy dress with transparent sleeves represents the freedom and comfort that every person needs.
 The calm and pleasant environment, with soft light shining on it, portrays a sense of silence and tenderness and invites us to stop for a moment, take a deep breath and enjoy the beauty of life.  This image can invite us to remember the importance of quiet moments in our lives and to focus on small beauties.

legacy.name: Pariya

media.ext_alt_text: Stella had heard so much about Earth that she finally decided to visit. She bought what she believed was the perfect Earth outfit—hoodie and jeans—but, to be honest, she couldn't let go of her space helmet. On February 6th, 2025, Stella landed on Earth. According to a travel guide some Earthians (= humans living on Earth) spend their afternoons at a place called a café, having coffee and pastries like chocolate croissants—though she had no idea how to pronounce it. Embracing her adventurous side, she stepped into a café on her first day. Around her, people were working on rectangular-shaped devices, some adorned with a half-bitten apple logo. She found herself enjoying the atmosphere. Then, just a few seats away, an artist named Pariya also known as *Parisketchya*, sat sketching. Pariya immediately recognized Stella from a photo she had seen through Remart. That was the moment she—charmed by Stella's presence —began creating the very sketch you see now.

She bought what she believed was the perfect Earth outfit—hoodie and jeans—but, to be honest, she couldn't let go of her space helmet. On February 6th, 2025, Stella landed on Earth. According to a travel guide some Earthians (= humans living on Earth) spend their afternoons at a place called a café, having coffee and pastries like chocolate croissants—though she had no idea how to pronounce it. Embracing her adventurous side, she stepped into a café on her first day. Around her, people were working on rectangular-shaped devices, some adorned with a half-bitten apple logo. She found herself enjoying the atmosphere. Then, just a few seats away, an artist named Pariya also known as *Parisketchya*, sat sketching. Pariya immediately recognized Stella from a photo she had seen through Remart. That was the moment she—charmed by Stella's presence —began creating the very sketch you see now.
